questions.question: [FORMAL LETTER] [Sample Paper 1, Q2(i)] Write a letter to the Customer Care Manager of a renowned delivery app, complaining about not receiving the package you had ordered and paid for in advance through their app. Give details of the nature of complaint and suggest remedies so that others do not face such a problem.
questions.answer:
16/8, 22nd Cross Street,
Indira Nagar,
Adyar,
Chennai - 600020.

9th April, 2026

The Customer Care Manager,
QuickDrop Delivery App,
Chennai Regional Office,
Chennai - 600002.

Dear Sir/Madam,

Subject: Complaint regarding non-delivery of prepaid package ordered through your app

I am writing to bring to your notice a serious issue regarding a package that I ordered through your delivery app and paid for in advance, but which has still not been delivered.

On 2nd April, 2026, I placed an order through your app for a set of school notebooks and geometry instruments. The total amount of Rs. 1,285 was paid online at the time of placing the order. According to the app, the package was supposed to be delivered by 5th April, 2026. However, it is now 9th April, and I have neither received the package nor been given any proper update about the delay.

The tracking page has been showing the same status, 'Out for delivery', for the past three days. I contacted your helpline twice and also raised a complaint through the app, but I only received automated replies and no real assistance. This has caused me great inconvenience because I needed these materials urgently for school work.

I request you to look into this matter immediately and either ensure prompt delivery of my package or arrange for a full refund without delay. I also feel that your company should improve its service so that other customers do not face the same difficulty. The tracking details should be updated correctly at every stage, and customers should be able to speak to a customer care executive without a long delay. If a parcel cannot be delivered on the promised date, the customer should be informed clearly about the reason for the delay. In such cases, refunds or compensation should also be processed quickly so that customers are not kept waiting unnecessarily.

I hope you will treat this complaint seriously and take the necessary corrective action.

Yours faithfully,
Anirudh Ramkumar

questions.question: [INFORMAL LETTER] [Sample Paper 1, Q2(ii)] You had a particularly bad day. Your best friend, in an attempt to help you, tried to lighten your mood, but you got angry and snapped at him/her. Write a letter to him/her apologizing for your behaviour.
questions.answer:
16/8, 22nd Cross Street,
Indira Nagar,
Adyar,
Chennai - 600020.

9th April, 2026

Dear Vidyut,

I hope you are doing well. I have been wanting to write to you ever since yesterday because I feel very bad about the way I behaved with you.

I had a terrible day at school and at home. I was already upset because I had done badly in a surprise test, and later I was scolded for misplacing my notebook. By the time we met in the evening, I was feeling angry, disappointed, and tired. When you tried to cheer me up with your jokes and funny comments, instead of appreciating your concern, I snapped at you rudely.

I know that you were only trying to help me feel better, and I am truly sorry for speaking to you in such an unpleasant manner. You have always stood by me whenever I needed support, and you certainly did not deserve that kind of response from me. I realise now that I should have controlled my temper and spoken honestly about what was troubling me.

Please forgive me for my behaviour. I value our friendship a lot and I do not want one bad moment to hurt it. I promise to handle my feelings more calmly in the future. If you are free this weekend, let us meet and spend some time together. I would really like to make it up to you.

Once again, I am very sorry.

Your loving friend,
Anirudh

questions.question: [INFORMAL LETTER] [Sample Paper 2, Q2(i)] Write a letter to your grandmother thanking her for the present she sent you for your birthday. Give her some family news and tell her you hope to visit her some time soon.
questions.answer:
16/8, 22nd Cross Street,
Indira Nagar,
Adyar,
Chennai - 600020.

9th April, 2026

Dear Grandmother,

Thank you so much for the lovely birthday present you sent me. I was delighted when Mother gave me the parcel and I saw the beautiful watch inside. It is both elegant and useful, and I have already started wearing it to school. Every time I look at it, I think of you with love.

Your present made my birthday even more special. I also loved the sweet note you wrote and the blessings you sent. It means a lot to me that you always remember my special day so warmly.

Everyone at home is doing well. Mother has been busy with her music classes, and Father has just returned from a work trip to Bengaluru. Prahlad is practising hard for his school competition, and he keeps talking about how much he wants to show you his new drawing book. Our dog Bruno is as playful as ever and runs to the gate every evening as if he is expecting a visitor.

We were all talking about you last night, and Mother said we should plan a visit very soon. I do hope we can come during the next holidays. It would be wonderful to spend a few days with you, listen to your stories, and enjoy your delicious cooking.

Please take care of your health. Give my love to Grandfather. I hope to see you very soon.

With lots of love,
Anirudh

questions.question: [INFORMAL LETTER] [Sample Paper 2, Q2(ii)] You recently found a puppy dog crying outside your home. Your parents allowed you to keep it as a pet. Write a letter to your friend telling him/her about it. Give details about its appearance, habits and how you look after it.
questions.answer:
16/8, 22nd Cross Street,
Indira Nagar,
Adyar,
Chennai - 600020.

9th April, 2026

Dear Janina,

You will be so excited to hear this news. A few days ago, I found a tiny puppy crying near the gate outside our house. It looked frightened and hungry, and I could not bear to leave it there. I brought it inside, gave it some water, and told my parents about it. After discussing it for a while, they agreed to let me keep it as a pet.

The puppy is absolutely adorable. It has soft brown fur with white patches on its paws and chest. Its ears are floppy, its eyes are bright and curious, and its tail wags nonstop whenever anyone comes near. We have named him Bruno.

Bruno is playful, energetic, and very affectionate. He loves chasing a rubber ball around the hall and chewing old slippers if we do not watch him carefully. He follows me everywhere, especially when I am doing homework, and sometimes curls up under my chair. In the evenings he becomes especially lively and runs around the garden.

I have already started learning how to take care of him properly. I feed him at fixed times, make sure he always has clean water, and help Father take him for short walks. Mother has also arranged for a visit to the vet to make sure he is healthy and gets vaccinated. Looking after Bruno is teaching me responsibility, and I am enjoying every bit of it.

I wish you could come and meet him. You would love him at once. Do visit us one day soon.

Your loving friend,
Anirudh

questions.question: [INFORMAL LETTER] [Sample Paper 3, Q2] Write a letter to a friend who was expected to go for a picnic with the class but was unable to because he missed the school bus. Tell your friend about the wonderful day you spent with your class friends.
questions.answer:
16/8, 22nd Cross Street,
Indira Nagar,
Adyar,
Chennai - 600020.

9th April, 2026

Dear Aditya,

We all missed you so much on the class picnic yesterday. When we heard that you had missed the school bus, everyone felt disappointed because we knew how excited you had been about the trip.

Still, I thought I must write and tell you all about the wonderful day we had. We went to the eco-park near the lake just outside the city. The weather was pleasant, and the place looked beautiful with green lawns, tall trees, and colourful flowers everywhere. After reaching there, we had a short guided nature walk where we learnt about different birds and plants. Our teachers made the outing both fun and educational.

After that, we played several games in teams. There was a relay race, a treasure hunt, and even a friendly football match. The funniest moment was when Rahul slipped while trying to catch the ball and landed right on the grass. Everyone burst into laughter, including Rahul himself.

At lunchtime we all sat together under a large tree and shared snacks from our tiffin boxes. The teachers also joined us, and the atmosphere felt relaxed and cheerful. Later we took many photographs and sang songs on the bus while returning to school.

It was truly a memorable day, but it would have been even better if you had been there with us. Do not worry though, because our class teacher said there may be another outing later in the year. Next time we will make sure you do not miss the bus.

Take care and write back soon.

Your affectionate friend,
Anirudh
